roles.title: Literature Mapper
roles.goal: Track papers, update wiki structure, summarize claims, and extract contradictions or missing baselines.

roles.title: Repo and Dataset Scout
roles.goal: Identify the best codebases to adapt, audit runnable entrypoints, and verify dataset readiness.

roles.title: Skeptic and Executor
roles.goal: Challenge assumptions, find failure cases, define experiments, and maintain the experiment log and benchmark matrix.
